---
title: "Clinical Metrics by Medical Insurance Group"
author: "Nemo Zhou"
date: "2026-07-10"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
params:
  descriptive_output_dir: null
  analysis_year_label: null
---

<!--
Project: Frailty_Komoto clinical metrics by medical insurance visualization
Author: Nemo Zhou
Date started: 2026-07-10
Date last updated: 2026-07-16

Purpose:
This R Markdown report visualizes aggregate annual clinical metrics outputs
created by Code/2_EDA/4.1_describe_annual_clinical_metrics.R. It does not connect to
Redshift. It reads aggregate CSV files from the project-root Outputs folder and
renders CFI frailty level, Gagne score level, HIV-positive prevalence, and CCW
group prevalence by age group, sex, and race/ethnicity within medical insurance
comparison groups. Medicare is split into Medicare Advantage and Medicare FFS.
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.width = 12,
  fig.height = 5.5
)

library(ggplot2)
```

```{r helpers}
if (!is.null(params$descriptive_output_dir) && nzchar(params$descriptive_output_dir)) {
  output_dir <- params$descriptive_output_dir
} else {
  output_roots <- c("Outputs", "../Outputs", "../../Outputs")
  output_subdirs <- c(
    "4.1_annual_clinical_metrics_descriptive_2025",
    "4.1_annual_clinical_metrics_descriptive"
  )
  output_grid <- expand.grid(
    root = output_roots,
    subdir = output_subdirs,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  output_dir_candidates <- file.path(output_grid$root, output_grid$subdir)
  output_dir <- output_dir_candidates[dir.exists(output_dir_candidates)][1]
}

if (is.null(output_dir) || is.na(output_dir) || !dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  stop(
    "Could not find the clinical metrics descriptive output directory. ",
    "Run Code/2_EDA/4.1_describe_annual_clinical_metrics.R first."
  )
}

read_required_csv <- function(file_name) {
  path <- file.path(output_dir, file_name)
  if (!file.exists(path)) {
    stop(
      "Missing required file: ",
      path,
      ". Rerun Code/2_EDA/4.4_run_annual_clinical_metrics_descriptive_analysis.R ",
      "for this year so the medical-insurance comparison CSVs are available."
    )
  }

  utils::read.csv(path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
}

comma_label <- function(x) {
  format(round(as.numeric(x)), big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE, trim = TRUE)
}

percent_axis_label <- function(x) {
  paste0(sprintf("%.1f", 100 * as.numeric(x)), "%")
}

wrap_label <- function(x, width = 18) {
  vapply(
    as.character(x),
    function(value) paste(strwrap(value, width = width), collapse = "\n"),
    character(1)
  )
}

insurance_order <- c(
  "Commercial",
  "Medicaid",
  "Medicare Advantage",
  "Medicare FFS"
)

subgroup_labels <- c(
  age_group = "Age group",
  sex = "Sex",
  race_ethnicity = "Race/ethnicity"
)

subgroup_order <- c("age_group", "sex", "race_ethnicity")

metric_palette <- c(
  "Commercial" = "#2E86AB",
  "Medicaid" = "#7D5BA6",
  "Medicare Advantage" = "#3F7C85",
  "Medicare FFS" = "#A44A3F"
)

cfi_level_palette <- c(
  "Non-frail" = "#2E7D32",
  "Prefrail" = "#F9A825",
  "Frail" = "#C62828"
)

gagne_level_palette <- c(
  "Gagne <0" = "#6A4C93",
  "Gagne 0" = "#2E86AB",
  "Gagne 1-2" = "#52B788",
  "Gagne 3-5" = "#F9C74F",
  "Gagne 6+" = "#D62828"
)

fill_palette <- c(
  "#2E86AB",
  "#7D5BA6",
  "#3F7C85",
  "#A44A3F",
  "#F2B134",
  "#6A994E",
  "#B56576",
  "#577590",
  "#BC6C25",
  "#4D908E"
)

ccw_group_labels <- c(
  CV = "Cardiovascular and metabolic",
  LDND = "Learning/developmental/neurologic disability",
  MH = "Mental health",
  MUSC = "Musculoskeletal and mobility-related",
  OCC = "Other chronic conditions",
  PULM = "Pulmonary",
  SENSE = "Sensory conditions",
  SU = "Substance use"
)

prepare_insurance_data <- function(data, numeric_columns) {
  for (column in intersect(numeric_columns, names(data))) {
    data[[column]] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(data[[column]]))
  }
  data$mx_insurance_comparison_group <- factor(
    data$mx_insurance_comparison_group,
    levels = insurance_order
  )
  data <- data[!is.na(data$mx_insurance_comparison_group), , drop = FALSE]
  data
}

order_stratum_values <- function(values) {
  values <- unique(as.character(values))
  age_order <- c("40-49", "50-64", "65-74", "75-84", "85+", "UNKNOWN")
  sex_order <- c("F", "M", "UNKNOWN")
  if (all(values %in% age_order)) {
    return(age_order[age_order %in% values])
  }
  if (all(values %in% sex_order)) {
    return(sex_order[sex_order %in% values])
  }
  sort(values)
}

format_bar_label <- function(x) {
  value <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  ifelse(is.na(value), "", paste0(sprintf("%.1f", 100 * value), "%"))
}

prepare_metric_level_data <- function(data, level_column, level_order) {
  data <- prepare_insurance_data(
    data,
    c("subgroup_denominator", "n_person_years", "percent_within_subgroup")
  )
  data <- data[
    !is.na(data$percent_within_subgroup) &
      !is.na(data$subgroup_denominator) &
      data$subgroup_denominator >= 11,
    ,
    drop = FALSE
  ]
  data$metric_level <- data[[level_column]]
  data$metric_level <- factor(data$metric_level, levels = level_order)
  data
}

plot_metric_level_distribution <- function(
  data,
  metric_label,
  subgroup,
  level_column,
  level_order,
  palette
) {
  plot_data <- prepare_metric_level_data(data, level_column, level_order)
  plot_data <- plot_data[plot_data$stratification == subgroup, , drop = FALSE]
  if (nrow(plot_data) == 0L) {
    return(NULL)
  }

  plot_data$stratum_value <- factor(
    plot_data$stratum_value,
    levels = order_stratum_values(plot_data$stratum_value)
  )
  plot_data$bar_label <- format_bar_label(plot_data$percent_within_subgroup)

  ggplot(
    plot_data,
    aes(
      x = stratum_value,
      y = percent_within_subgroup,
      fill = metric_level
    )
  ) +
    geom_col(width = 0.65, color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
    geom_text(
      aes(label = bar_label),
      position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
      color = "white",
      size = 2.5
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~ mx_insurance_comparison_group, nrow = 1) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_axis_label, expand = c(0, 0)) +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) wrap_label(x, width = 14)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = palette, breaks = level_order, drop = FALSE) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1), clip = "off") +
    labs(
      title = paste(metric_label, "level distribution by", subgroup_labels[[subgroup]]),
      x = NULL,
      y = "Person-years",
      fill = NULL
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )
}

plot_metric_summary <- function(data, metric_label, subgroup) {
  plot_data <- prepare_insurance_data(
    data,
    c("n_person_years", "mean_value", "p25", "median", "p75")
  )
  plot_data <- plot_data[
    plot_data$stratification == subgroup &
      !is.na(plot_data$median) &
      !is.na(plot_data$n_person_years) &
      plot_data$n_person_years >= 11,
    ,
    drop = FALSE
  ]
  if (nrow(plot_data) == 0L) {
    return(NULL)
  }

  plot_data$stratum_value <- factor(
    plot_data$stratum_value,
    levels = order_stratum_values(plot_data$stratum_value)
  )

  ggplot(
    plot_data,
    aes(
      x = stratum_value,
      y = median,
      ymin = p25,
      ymax = p75,
      color = mx_insurance_comparison_group
    )
  ) +
    geom_pointrange(linewidth = 0.45, fatten = 1.6) +
    facet_wrap(~ mx_insurance_comparison_group, nrow = 1) +
    scale_color_manual(values = metric_palette, drop = FALSE) +
    labs(
      title = paste(metric_label, "median and IQR by", subgroup_labels[[subgroup]]),
      x = NULL,
      y = metric_label,
      color = NULL
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      legend.position = "none",
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
    )
}

plot_hiv_prevalence <- function(data, subgroup) {
  plot_data <- prepare_insurance_data(
    data,
    c("denominator_person_years", "n_hiv_positive", "hiv_positive_prevalence")
  )
  plot_data <- plot_data[
    plot_data$stratification == subgroup &
      !is.na(plot_data$hiv_positive_prevalence) &
      !is.na(plot_data$denominator_person_years) &
      plot_data$denominator_person_years >= 11,
    ,
    drop = FALSE
  ]
  if (nrow(plot_data) == 0L) {
    return(NULL)
  }

  plot_data$stratum_value <- factor(
    plot_data$stratum_value,
    levels = order_stratum_values(plot_data$stratum_value)
  )

  ggplot(
    plot_data,
    aes(
      x = mx_insurance_comparison_group,
      y = hiv_positive_prevalence,
      fill = stratum_value
    )
  ) +
    geom_col(position = position_dodge2(width = 0.85, preserve = "single"), width = 0.72) +
    geom_text(
      aes(label = format_bar_label(hiv_positive_prevalence)),
      position = position_dodge2(width = 0.85, preserve = "single"),
      vjust = -0.25,
      size = 2.8
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~ analysis_year) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_axis_label, expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.12))) +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) wrap_label(x, width = 12)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = fill_palette, drop = FALSE) +
    labs(
      title = paste("HIV-positive prevalence by", subgroup_labels[[subgroup]]),
      x = NULL,
      y = "HIV-positive prevalence",
      fill = subgroup_labels[[subgroup]]
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )
}

plot_ccw_group_prevalence <- function(data, subgroup) {
  plot_data <- prepare_insurance_data(
    data,
    c("denominator_person_years", "n_with_group", "prevalence")
  )
  plot_data <- plot_data[
    plot_data$stratification == subgroup &
      !is.na(plot_data$prevalence) &
      !is.na(plot_data$denominator_person_years) &
      plot_data$denominator_person_years >= 11,
    ,
    drop = FALSE
  ]
  if (nrow(plot_data) == 0L) {
    return(NULL)
  }

  plot_data$stratum_value <- factor(
    plot_data$stratum_value,
    levels = order_stratum_values(plot_data$stratum_value)
  )
  plot_data$ccw_group_label <- unname(ccw_group_labels[plot_data$ccw_group])
  plot_data$ccw_group_label[
    is.na(plot_data$ccw_group_label) | plot_data$ccw_group_label == ""
  ] <- plot_data$ccw_group[
    is.na(plot_data$ccw_group_label) | plot_data$ccw_group_label == ""
  ]

  ggplot(
    plot_data,
    aes(
      x = mx_insurance_comparison_group,
      y = prevalence,
      fill = stratum_value
    )
  ) +
    geom_col(position = position_dodge2(width = 0.85, preserve = "single"), width = 0.72) +
    geom_text(
      aes(label = format_bar_label(prevalence)),
      position = position_dodge2(width = 0.85, preserve = "single"),
      vjust = -0.25,
      size = 2.4
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~ ccw_group_label, ncol = 4) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_axis_label, expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.16))) +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) wrap_label(x, width = 12)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = fill_palette, drop = FALSE) +
    labs(
      title = paste("CCW group prevalence by", subgroup_labels[[subgroup]]),
      x = NULL,
      y = "Prevalence",
      fill = subgroup_labels[[subgroup]]
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )
}

print_metric_subgroup_plots <- function(data, metric_label) {
  for (subgroup in subgroup_order) {
    cat("\n\n## ", subgroup_labels[[subgroup]], "\n\n", sep = "")
    plot <- plot_metric_summary(data, metric_label, subgroup)
    if (is.null(plot)) {
      cat("No unsuppressed aggregate rows are available for this subgroup.\n\n")
    } else {
      print(plot)
    }
  }
}

print_metric_level_subgroup_plots <- function(
  data,
  metric_label,
  level_column,
  level_order,
  palette
) {
  for (subgroup in subgroup_order) {
    cat("\n\n## ", subgroup_labels[[subgroup]], "\n\n", sep = "")
    plot <- plot_metric_level_distribution(
      data,
      metric_label,
      subgroup,
      level_column,
      level_order,
      palette
    )
    if (is.null(plot)) {
      cat("No unsuppressed aggregate rows are available for this subgroup.\n\n")
    } else {
      print(plot)
    }
  }
}

print_prevalence_subgroup_plots <- function(data, plot_function) {
  for (subgroup in subgroup_order) {
    cat("\n\n## ", subgroup_labels[[subgroup]], "\n\n", sep = "")
    plot <- plot_function(data, subgroup)
    if (is.null(plot)) {
      cat("No unsuppressed aggregate rows are available for this subgroup.\n\n")
    } else {
      print(plot)
    }
  }
}
```

```{r read-data}
cfi_insurance_subgroups <- read_required_csv(
  "4.1_cfi_level_by_mx_insurance_subgroup.csv"
)
gagne_insurance_subgroups <- read_required_csv(
  "4.1_gagne_level_by_mx_insurance_subgroup.csv"
)
hiv_insurance_subgroups <- read_required_csv(
  "4.1_hiv_prevalence_by_mx_insurance_subgroup.csv"
)
ccw_group_insurance_subgroups <- read_required_csv(
  "4.1_ccw_group_prevalence_by_mx_insurance_subgroup.csv"
)
```

# CFI

```{r cfi-by-insurance-subgroups, results='asis', fig.show='asis', fig.width=13, fig.height=5.2}
print_metric_level_subgroup_plots(
  cfi_insurance_subgroups,
  "CFI",
  level_column = "frailty_level",
  level_order = c("Robust (<0.15)", "Prefrail (0.15-<0.25)", "Frail (>=0.25)"),
  palette = c(
    "Robust (<0.15)" = cfi_level_palette[["Non-frail"]],
    "Prefrail (0.15-<0.25)" = cfi_level_palette[["Prefrail"]],
    "Frail (>=0.25)" = cfi_level_palette[["Frail"]]
  )
)
```

# Gagne

```{r gagne-by-insurance-subgroups, results='asis', fig.show='asis', fig.width=13, fig.height=5.2}
print_metric_level_subgroup_plots(
  gagne_insurance_subgroups,
  "Gagne",
  level_column = "gagne_level",
  level_order = c("Gagne <0", "Gagne 0", "Gagne 1-2", "Gagne 3-5", "Gagne 6+"),
  palette = gagne_level_palette
)
```

# HIV

```{r hiv-by-insurance-subgroups, results='asis', fig.show='asis', fig.width=12, fig.height=5.8}
print_prevalence_subgroup_plots(hiv_insurance_subgroups, plot_hiv_prevalence)
```

# CCW Groups

```{r ccw-by-insurance-subgroups, results='asis', fig.show='asis', fig.width=13, fig.height=8}
print_prevalence_subgroup_plots(ccw_group_insurance_subgroups, plot_ccw_group_prevalence)
```
